name: orys
description: Orys Learning Architecture™ — pedagogical methodology marketplace by Dr. de Souza. Framework-agnostic core plugin for MS + HS + Higher Ed teachers (USA + Brazil). Bilingual PT/EN.

plugins.name: orys
plugins.description: Orys Learning Architecture™ / Arquitetura de Aprendizagem Orys™ — pedagogical methodology plugin with 6 Architectural Layers, 10 Orys Patterns™, Bloom × Big Five 1-to-1 mapping, UDL, Andragogy, IDL, AI Literacy critique table, 5 Orys-8 collaboration protocols, time-budget discipline. Slash commands: /orys:architecture, /orys:diagnose, /orys:pattern, /orys:rubric, /orys:worksheet.
